yamlContent:
topic:
  name: /referee
  type: sentry_msgs/msg/Referee
map_metadata:
  image_path: RMUC2026赛场渲染图.png
  resolution: 0.01
  width_pixels: 2800
  height_pixels: 1500
  origin_pixel:
    - 390
    - 695
waypoints:
  - name: 守护堡垒点
    pixel:
      - 388.29787234042556
      - 805.0531833729846
    world:
      - -0.017
      - -1.101
  - name: 打符点
    pixel:
      - 1015.9574468085107
      - 408.7765876283037
    world:
      - 6.26
      - 2.862
  - name: 巡逻点
    pixel:
      - 940.1595744680851
      - 987.2340344368143
    world:
      - 5.502
      - -2.922
  - name: 补给点
    pixel:
      - 217.6015473887814
      - 1291.7619064274706
    world:
      - -1.724
      - -5.968
  - name: 前哨攻击点
    pixel:
      - 1151.0413821769139
      - 236.18286268512506
    world:
      - 7.61
      - 4.588
zones: []
decision_tree:
  root:
    type: Selector
    children:
      - type: Sequence
        priority: 1
        children:
          - type: Condition
            field: game_progress
            value_type: uint16
            operator: '=='
            threshold: 4
          - type: Condition
            field: current_hp
            value_type: uint16
            operator: <
            threshold: 150
          - type: Action
            action: 补给点
            exit_condition:
              field: current_hp
              value_type: uint16
              operator: '>='
              threshold: 400
      - type: Sequence
        priority: 2
        children:
          - type: Condition
            field: game_progress
            value_type: uint16
            operator: '=='
            threshold: 4
          - type: Condition
            field: shoot_num
            value_type: uint16
            operator: <=
            threshold: 30
          - type: Action
            action: 补给点
            exit_condition:
              field: shoot_num
              value_type: uint16
              operator: '>='
              threshold: 100
      - type: Sequence
        priority: 3
        children:
          - type: Condition
            field: game_progress
            value_type: uint16
            operator: '=='
            threshold: 4
          - type: Condition
            field: fortress_status
            value_type: uint16
            operator: '=='
            threshold: 2
          - type: Condition
            field: vision_status
            value_type: uint8
            operator: '=='
            threshold: 1
          - type: Action
            action: STOP
      - type: Sequence
        priority: 3
        children:
          - type: Condition
            field: game_progress
            value_type: uint16
            operator: '=='
            threshold: 4
          - type: Condition
            field: fortress_status
            value_type: uint16
            operator: '=='
            threshold: 2
          - type: Action
            action: 守护堡垒点
      - type: Sequence
        priority: 4
        children:
          - type: Condition
            field: game_progress
            value_type: uint16
            operator: '=='
            threshold: 4
          - type: Condition
            field: rune_statues
            value_type: uint16
            operator: '!='
            threshold: 2
          - type: Action
            action: 前哨攻击点
          - type: Condition
            field: vision_status
            value_type: uint8
            operator: '=='
            threshold: 1
          - type: Action
            action: 前哨攻击点
            actions:
              - 前哨攻击点
            loop: true
      - type: Sequence
        priority: 4
        children:
          - type: Condition
            field: game_progress
            value_type: uint16
            operator: '=='
            threshold: 4
          - type: Condition
            field: rune_statues
            value_type: uint16
            operator: '!='
            threshold: 2
          - type: Action
            action: 前哨攻击点
          - type: Action
            action: 前哨攻击点
            actions:
              - 前哨攻击点
            loop: true
